next_steps: Enable SSH in DSM Control Panel → Terminal & SNMP on each NAS before first maintain.
Store per-host SSH passwords: `node apps/hdc-cli/cli.mjs secrets set HDC_SYNOLOGY_SSH_PASSWORD_NAS_1` (and _NAS_2).
After DSM reboot during maintain, Proxmox CIFS storage to nas-a/nas-b may be briefly unavailable.

services.title: NAS health query
services.summary: DSM version, volume usage, RAID/md status, and disk summary over SSH.

services.title: NAS maintain
services.summary: Bootstrap SSH keys, DSM upgrade (reboot), synopkg upgradeall; markdown report.

services.title: Docker ensure (library)
services.summary: Ensure Container Manager or Docker package is installed, started, and docker CLI responds (synology-docker-ensure.mjs).

services.title: Docker Compose (library)
services.summary: Deploy, maintain, and teardown docker compose stacks over SSH (synology-docker-compose.mjs).
